video.title: LLMs Do Not Edit Videos. Tools and Harnesses Do.
video.description:
The cleanest AI-agent argument in the livestream: video models are not directly editing files, FFmpeg and other tool calls are doing the work, and the harness gives the agent goals, memory, loops, and practical capability.

Edit note: Kept mostly continuous because this section is already a focused argument.

This is a topic-edited cut from the livestream: https://youtube.com/live/1liD1s8HlsQ?feature=share

Original livestream timestamp range(s): 16:31-27:45

Not medical, legal, financial, or training advice. Personal experience and commentary.

#AIAgents #FitnessTech #JiuJitsu
